summary: Iteration 222 — P0.25: Domande Contestuali Dinamiche. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified. Dynamic contextual questions appear based on parent answers (montaggio positive → ctx_mont_01/02, zincatura external → ctx_zinc_01/02). Trigger labels show 'Comparsa perché hai...' in blue. Quick buttons work for contextual questions. 'Salva Contestuali' button saves answers correctly. Stale marking works when parent answer changes.
